creator: gugod@gugod.org
text:
gugod-clean now has font with width 20.

Fix: Apply the patch to update the port.
---8<---
PORTNAME=      gugod-clean
-PORTVERSION=   1.0
+PORTVERSION=   1.1
 CATEGORIES=    chinese x11-fonts
 MASTER_SITES=  ftp://gugod.org/pub/X/

 MAINTAINER=    gugod@gugod.org

-FONTFILES=     gugodclean.bdf
+FONTFILES=     gugodclean.bdf g20.bdf
 USE_X_PREFIX=  yes

 WRKSRC=                ${WRKDIR}
